disambiguated.context: I was surprised when there were two repair specialists, Jose Contreras and DeShawn Banks, who showed up to change the lightbulbs in my bedroom. It isn't a two person job. Jose Contreras did everything, and DeShawn Banks just watched and messed around on their phone.
disambiguated.question: Who was lazy and just watched the other person do the work?
